# Uniwise Global Solutions Sdn. Bhd. - Full Information for LLMs
# https://www.uniwiseglobal.com
# Last Updated: 2026-04-06

## Company Identity

Company Name: Uniwise Global Solutions Sdn. Bhd.
Legal Entity Type: Sdn. Bhd. (Sendirian Berhad - Malaysian Private Limited Company)
Headquarters: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Industry: Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Customer Service Outsourcing, IT Service Management
Website: https://www.uniwiseglobal.com
Email: info@uniwiseglobal.com

## Business Registration (MSIC Codes)

1. MSIC 82110 - Combined Office Administrative Service Activities
2. MSIC 8299 - Other Business Support Service Activities
3. MSIC 6209 - Other Information Technology Service Activities

## Mission

Uniwise Global Solutions helps businesses deliver excellent customer service without overspending on internal support teams. We recruit, train, and manage dedicated customer service teams that work exclusively for each client's business.

## Services in Detail

### 1. Customer Service Center Operations

This is the core offering. Uniwise builds and manages dedicated customer service teams that represent the client's brand across all communication channels.

Services include:
- Inbound Call Handling: Agents answer with the client's brand greeting and resolve customer issues directly.
- Outbound Call Campaigns: Follow-up calls, satisfaction surveys, appointment confirmations, and proactive customer outreach.
- Live Chat Support: Real-time chat support on websites and apps, with agents handling multiple conversations simultaneously.
- Email and Ticket Management: Processing and responding to customer emails and support tickets within client-defined SLA timelines.
- Complaint Resolution: Agents follow client escalation procedures to resolve complaints and maintain customer satisfaction.
- After-Sales Support: Order tracking, return processing, warranty claims, and post-purchase follow-up.

Real Example: Uniwise manages the full customer support operation for an e-commerce client processing over 500 orders daily. A 12-person team handles all inbound calls, live chat, and return processing, maintaining a 94% customer satisfaction score.

### 2. Office Administrative Support

Uniwise handles administrative workloads so client teams can focus on strategic priorities.

Services include:
- Data Entry and Processing: Accurate and fast data input for databases, CRM systems, and internal platforms.
- Document Management: Organization, filing, and management of business documents in digital and physical formats.
- Scheduling and Calendar Management: Meeting coordination, appointment scheduling, and team calendar management.
- Records and Filing: Structured and easily accessible business record maintenance.
- Report Preparation: Regular report compilation, data presentation, and operational summaries.
- General Office Coordination: Daily office activity coordination including vendor management and procurement support.

Real Example: A logistics startup uses Uniwise admin services to process an average of 200 orders per day, manage delivery scheduling, and handle all operational documentation. They avoided hiring three full-time back-office staff and saved approximately 40% of admin operational costs.

### 3. IT Service and Technical Support

Uniwise provides help desk and IT service management for businesses that need responsive tech support without building a full in-house IT department.

Services include:
- Help Desk Support (Tier 1 and Tier 2): Handling technical inquiries, password resets, and basic to intermediate troubleshooting.
- Technical Troubleshooting: Diagnosis and resolution of technical issues across software, hardware, and network systems.
- System Monitoring and Alerts: 24/7 system monitoring with real-time notifications when anomalies or downtime occur.
- Software Installation and Configuration: Setup and configuration of business applications, productivity tools, and specialized software.
- User Account Management: User account management, access rights, new employee IT onboarding, and offboarding.
- IT Asset Tracking: Company IT asset tracking including laptops, servers, software licenses, and other devices.

Real Example: A SaaS company with 150 employees uses Uniwise help desk services to handle an average of 45 internal support tickets per day. The team resolves 90% of Tier 1 tickets within 30 minutes.

## Service Delivery Process

1. Consultation and Assessment: Review client needs, customer volume, tools in use, and target SLAs. Create a tailored proposal.
2. Recruitment and Training: Recruit agents matching the client business profile, train them on products, brand voice, and procedures. Average onboarding: 2 weeks.
3. Operations and Optimization: Daily monitoring, weekly performance reports, ongoing adjustments to improve service quality.

## Key Differentiators

1. Trained Dedicated Teams: Every agent assigned to a client account goes through product-specific training. They learn the brand voice, FAQ patterns, and escalation procedures. Not a generic call center service.
2. Scalable Without Fixed Costs: Team size adjusts based on actual volume. Clients pay for what they use, not for idle seats. Can scale from 5 agents to 20+ during peak seasons.
3. Full Operational Transparency: Real-time dashboards showing call volumes, resolution rates, response times, and customer satisfaction scores.

## Company Values

1. Accountability: Full ownership of every customer interaction.
2. Transparency: Full visibility into operations through dashboards, weekly reports, and direct account manager access.
3. Adaptability: Support team scales based on actual demand with no long-term lock-ins.

## Operating Hours

- Office: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (MYT). Saturday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM.
- Customer Service Center: 24/7 for active clients.
- Email Response Time: Within 1 business day.

## Target Clients

- E-commerce companies processing high daily order volumes
- Technology and SaaS companies with growing user bases
- Startups needing flexible support without long-term commitments
- Businesses of any size looking to outsource customer service, admin, or IT support

## Geographic Service Area

Primary: Malaysia
Service delivery available for: Southeast Asia and global clients (remote support)
